commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=76d50f277205d66a9d2d9a0e82ec6de84707e422)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a time-based fallback that deletes any diagnostic session state older than the session-state TTL, regardless of state or queue depth.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: failed recovery outcomes do not mutate the diagnostic state, while current pruning only deletes idle empty entries. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review should choose the recovery-aware cleanup shape among the open linked-fix PRs; the current branch is not a safe automation takeover.

target.title: fix(logging): prune non-idle stale diagnostic session entries
target.author: dwc1997

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
